article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Multiple attribution rule violations (flagging Trump’s quoted language), several false positives (ignoring provided attribution), and a missed clearer author-level bias (“regime” in author voice). One defensible Bias by Omission point.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged quoted text as author bias twice: the hyperbolic ‘largest Armada’ line and ‘illegitimate Maduro Regime’ are Trump’s quotes.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: 3/4 items are not genuine author-prose bias: two are quoted language; the ‘Skipper/1,000 tankers’ line is attributed (‘according to the administration’).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clearer author-level ‘Word Choice’ in headline/subhead/body using ‘regime’ in author voice; broader omission could be noted, but one BBO item was included.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Where items were invalidly sourced from quotes, labels don’t apply; the ‘unsubstantiated claims’ label misreads an attributed claim. Only the Bias by Omission item is defensible.
